Phase 12.name: Operational Intelligence + Deprecation Stabilization
in_progress_highlights: v0.11.18 (80470cd): FULL mypy strict 도달 — 109 file clean, 0 errors (v0.11.10 cumulative 35 file → v0.11.18 107 file → v0.11.21 109 file)

v0.11.19~v0.11.21 (3 batch): 11 skill → 9 stable + 2 beta + 1 alpha (session-start, doc-sync, validation-plan, code-index-update, backlog-update, merge-doc-reconcile, workflow-linter, project-status-assessment, robust-patcher 모두 stable; automated-repro-scaffold, git-conflict-resolver 가 남은 2 beta + 1 alpha)
v0.11.22 (in release): ADR-005 Memora-inspired Memory Index Phase 1~3d 8 release 완료 (prototype + state.json hook + --merge opt-in + BM25 stdlib fallback + dispatcher entry + 3 skill opt-in wiring)

v0.13.1 (telemetry wiring commit, 2026-07-09): Phase 13 AC2 memory_index telemetry sidecar close — 3 skill (session-start / doc-sync / backlog-update) + dispatcher `memory-index-query` 의 opt-in retrieval 호출 자동 telemetry emit (JSONL append-only) + dashboard panel 3 의 `retrieval_hit_rate` placeholder → 실측값 전환 + `cmd_memory_index_telemetry` subcommand 36 (read-only inspect) + drift prevention 6/6 PASS + mypy 0 new error

v0.13.2 (self-recover wiring commit, 2026-07-09): Phase 13 AC3 self-recovering drift prevention close — `cmd_self_recover` dispatcher subcommand 37 (read-only inspect + --apply/dry-run) + drift detection (smoke subprocess) → classify (5 auto-fixable + 1 manual_required) → fix → re-check 1-cycle orchestrator + `cmd_release` 의 validate step 후 자동 호출 (--skip-self-recover escape hatch) + release note 본문에 `## Self-recovery log` 섹션 자동 append (idempotent) + check_self_recovering_v0_13_2.py 8/8 PASS + drift prevention 6/6 PASS + mypy strict 0 new error

v0.13.3 (bidir-link wiring commit, 2026-07-09): Phase 13 AC4+ self-documenting wiki ↔ memory bidirectional link close — `workflow_kit/common/state/bidir_link.py` 신규 (audit_bidirectional_links / sync_memory_to_wiki / normalize_memory_path_to_wiki_relative 3 helper + 3 dataclass) + `cmd_bidir_link` dispatcher subcommand 38 (R-A sync + R-C audit 1-cycle, --apply/--json) + `cmd_release` 의 sync-maturity-matrix 후 bidir-link audit 자동 호출 (--skip-bidir-link escape hatch) + release note 본문에 `## Bidirectional link audit` 섹션 자동 append (idempotent) + check_bidir_link_v0_13_3.py 6/6 PASS + drift prevention 6/6 PASS + audit is_symmetric=true (asymmetric_count=0)

v0.14.0 (append-only close-out, 2026-07-16): Phase 14 AC1~AC4 close — `workflow-source/tools/migrate_active_to_appendonly.py` 신규 (idempotent 1-cycle: work_backlog.md 58KB/93 entries → backlog/<date>.md 19 daily + backlog/tasks/TASK-<date>-<NNN>.md 91 + sessions/<stem>.md 2 분할) + workflow_kit/common/paths.py helper 3개 (workflow_backlog_dir / workflow_tasks_dir / workflow_sessions_dir) + state/builder.py signature 확장 (daily_backlog_dir / tasks_dir / sessions_dir kwarg, default None, legacy 1st cycle fallback) + state/cache.py refresh_workflow_state_cache 신규 dir 입력 + scripts/generate_workflow_state.py CLI flag 3개 (--daily-backlog-dir / --tasks-dir / --sessions-dir) + state.json.source_of_truth 5 keys → 9 keys (legacy 2 + 신규 3 + 정합 + repo_assess) + 88 file path string sed 일괄 (`work_backlog.md` → `backlog/`, `session_handoff.md` → `sessions/`, R9 immutable archive/revert 처리) + MEMORY_GOVERNANCE.md §2 4 템플릿 (Daily Index / Per-Task / Per-Session / State.json) + state.json.template 갱신 + WORKFLOW_INDEX.md 신규 layout 가이드 link + 신규 smoke check_appendonly_memory_layout.py 6/6 PASS + check_memory_freeze_lint.py REQUIRED_DIRS 추가 (R9 archive legacy directory 검증 ❌, active/ 만 검증) + drift prevention 6/6 PASS + mypy strict 0 new error. **1st deprecation cycle** (ADR-003): work_backlog.md → work_backlog.md.bak fallback, v0.14.5 2nd cycle / v0.15.0 완전 drop 예정.

v0.14.1 (MCP 1st batch stable + workflow_log_rotator 정리, 2026-07-16): Phase 14 MCP stable 정공법 적용 — `workflow_kit/common/schemas/git_history_summarizer.py` + `workflow_kit/common/schemas/smart_context_reader.py` 2 종 Pydantic schema 신규 (BaseOutput 상속, 4 error codes tuple 정의) + `tests/check_git_history_summarizer.py` 5 case 강화 (markdown / json / --help / pydantic validate / categories int) + 기존 5 case unittest (smart_context_reader) 그대로 유지 + maturity_matrix.mcp_tools 정합: `git_history_summarizer` + `smart_context_reader` beta → **stable** (stage + promotion_target v0.14.1 + stable_acceptance_status 6/6 True) + `workflow_log_rotator` **stale 제거** (mcp_servers/workflow_log_rotator/ dir 부재, removal_reason 명시) + `apply_robust_patch` beta 유지 (2nd batch target v0.14.2, pydantic_schema + smoke_test_5_cases 미충족 정공법 적용 필요) + run_git_history_summarizer.py TOOL_VERSION `0.5.10-beta` → `v0.14.1-beta`. **누적 smoke**: drift prevention 6/6 + memory_lint 4/4 + memory_freeze_lint 1 + appendonly_memory_layout 6/6 + git_history_summarizer 5/5 + smart_context_reader 5/5 모두 PASS.

v0.14.2 (MCP 2nd batch stable — apply_robust_patch, 2026-07-16): Phase 14 MCP 2nd batch 정공법 적용 — `workflow_kit/common/schemas/apply_robust_patch.py` 신규 (BaseOutput 상속, `ApplyRobustPatchOutput` + `AppliedPatchBlock` nested + 4 error codes tuple + optional error/error_code/source_context envelope) + `workflow_kit/common/writing_bundle.py:apply_robust_patch_payload` 가 schema 정합 emit 으로 refactor (file_not_found / malformed_patch_block / apply_robust_patch_runtime_error 3 stage error handling + ErrorOutput envelope) + `tests/check_apply_robust_patch.py` 신규 5 case (--help / valid_patch / file_not_found / malformed_patch / pydantic validate) — **쓰기 작업 MCP** 이므로 tempfile.TemporaryDirectory 로 side-effect 격리 + maturity_matrix.mcp_tools 정합: `apply_robust_patch` beta → **stable** (stage + promotion_target v0.14.2 + stable_acceptance_status 6/6 True) + MCP.md status prototype → stable + Pydantic schema (BaseOutput 상속). **누적 smoke**: 기존 6 + **apply_robust_patch 5/5** = **7 smoke 모두 PASS** + drift prevention 6/6 회귀 ❌.

v0.14.3 (Phase 15 dashboard Panel 6/7/8, 2026-07-16): Phase 15 dashboard 신규 panel 3 종 — Panel 6 `multi_agent_concurrent_write_conflict` (north-star metric, active/ working tree 의 git conflict marker 검출 + status pass/fail) + Panel 7 `deprecation_cycle_progress` (stage=v0.14.1 current + bak_present + timeline 4 entry) + Panel 8 `memory_index_utilization_v2` (Panel 3 강화, telemetry 통합: entries_total + by_merge_state + telemetry_events_total + by_source + hit_rate). `workflow_kit/common/dashboard_data.py` +160 (3 collect + 3 render 함수) + schema_version `1.0` → **`1.1`** (Phase 15 정합) + 신규 smoke `tests/check_phase15_dashboard_panels.py` **4/4 PASS** (Panel 6 conflict_count=0 / Panel 7 stage=v0.14.1 / Panel 8 entries+telemetry / 8 panel 모두 정합). dashboard snapshot.md regen — Panel 6 north-star metric: **conflict_count: 0** (active/ working tree 정합) + Panel 7 timeline 정합 + Panel 8 telemetry_hit_rate: **1.0** (1 release ≥ 1 query+hit, AC2 north-star). **누적 smoke**: 기존 7 + **phase15_dashboard_panels 4/4** = **8 smoke 모두 PASS** + drift prevention 6/6 회귀 ❌.

v0.14.5 (2nd deprecation cycle 시작 — --legacy-memory flag, 2026-07-16): **Phase 14 ADR-003 2nd cycle 진입.** `workflow_kit/common/state/cache.py:refresh_workflow_state_cache` + `build_state_cache_refresh_hint` 신규 kwarg `legacy_memory: bool | None = None` (default True for 1st cycle backward compat) + branch_dir 하위 legacy path 자동 resolve 가 `legacy_memory_effective=True` 일 때만 동작. explicit `--no-legacy-memory` flag 로 2nd cycle strict opt-out 가능. `scripts/generate_workflow_state.py` CLI flag `--legacy-memory` / `--no-legacy-memory` 추가 (argparse BooleanOptionalAction). v0.14.1 warning + v0.14.5 ALERT 2 cycle 동시 emit (deprecation_cycle_stage + deprecation_warnings 정합). maturity_matrix 신규 top-level field `deprecation_cycle_stage: 'v0.14.5'` 추가 → Panel 7 dashboard 가 declared_stage 기반 동적 stage 표시 (v0.14.5 release 시 자동 `stage: v0.14.5`). 신규 smoke `tests/check_deprecation_cycle_v0_14_5.py` **4/4 PASS** (legacy_memory_with_bak / no_legacy_with_bak / no_legacy_path / no_legacy_explicit). 정공법 정합 — dashboard Panel 7 snapshot regen: `stage: v0.14.5` + bak_present=True + next_release=v0.15.0 + timeline 4 entry. **누적 smoke**: 기존 8 + **deprecation_cycle_v0_14_5 4/4** = **9 smoke 모두 PASS** + drift prevention 6/6 회귀 ❌. **Out of scope v0.15.0**: legacy_memory 강제 False (2nd cycle 종결), work_backlog.md.bak 완전 drop.
